name: Desolator
description: A wicked weapon, used in torturing political criminals.

abilities.name: Corruption
abilities.description: The wielder's successful attack applies an armor reduction debuff on the affected enemy unit. Armor Reduction: 6. Duration: 7.

abilities.name: Soul Stealer
abilities.description: Increases the item's bonus attack damage per debuff-affected enemy hero killed by Corruption. Attack Damage Bonus per Stack: 1.
